validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.username_charset: Only letters, numbers, dots, dashes, underscores

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload an avatar. Images will be resized to 256x256 pixels.

username.label: Username
username.cooldown_error: You can only change your username once every 30 days. Try again in {remaining}.
username.cooldown_notice: You can change your username again in {remaining}.
username.confirm_prompt: Are you sure you want to change your username to @{login}?
username.confirm_cooldown: You can only change your username once every 30 days.

system.label: System
system.description: Follow your browser or OS appearance

light.label: Light
light.description: Use the light interface on this browser

dark.label: Dark
dark.description: Use the dark interface on this browser

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for this browser.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Set your timezone to display timestamps in your local time. Leave empty to use your browser's default.
timezone.invalid: Please select a valid timezone from the list

browser_default.label: Browser default
browser_default.description: Use your browser locale to determine 12h or 24h format

push.title: Push Notifications
push.not_configured: Push notifications are not configured on this server
push.not_supported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
push.blocked_description: Enable notifications in your browser or OS settings, then open Chatto again.
push.enabled_description: Chatto uses your browser or OS notification permission as the switch. To turn notifications off, disable them for this site in your browser or OS settings.
push.enable_description: Get notified about new messages even when the browser is closed.
push.blocked_error: Push notifications are blocked in your browser or OS settings.
push.enable_failed: Failed to enable push notifications. Please try again.
push.enable_error: An error occurred while enabling push notifications

push_prompt.title: Enable push notifications
push_prompt.message: Get notified about DMs, mentions, and replies.
push_prompt.blocked: Push notifications are blocked in your browser or OS settings

levels.server_description: Controls how you receive notifications for all rooms in this server. Individual rooms can override this setting.
levels.room_description: Override the server-level setting for individual rooms. Rooms set to "Default" inherit the server setting ({level}).

normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Unread markers + mentions, DMs, and thread replies

all_messages.label: All Messages
all_messages.description: Normal + notification for every new message

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your account settings
account.danger_description: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be removed.

delete_modal.title: Delete Account
delete_modal.warning_text: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete_modal.intro: This will permanently delete your account and:
delete_modal.remove_from_rooms: Remove you from all spaces and rooms
delete_modal.delete_messages: Delete all your messages (content will be unrecoverable)
delete_modal.delete_profile: Delete your profile, avatar, and associated data

login.title: Sign In
login.welcome_description: Connect to a Chatto server to get started. You can connect to multiple servers and switch between them.
login.password_reset_success: Password reset successful. Please sign in with your new password.
login.missing_token: Login response did not include an auth token

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.submitted_text: If that email is registered, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
forgot_password.spam_hint: Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
forgot_password.instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

reset_password.title: Set New Password
reset_password.invalid_text: This link is invalid or has expired.

register.title: Create Account
register.unavailable: Registration is not available on this instance.
register.missing_token: Registration response did not include an auth token

code.title: Check your email
code.sent_to: Enter the verification code sent to
code.missing: Enter the 6-digit code from your email

complete.invalid_text: This registration session is invalid or has expired.

callback.missing_flow: OAuth flow state not found. The session may have expired. Please try again.
callback.invalid_state: Invalid state parameter. This may be a CSRF attack.
callback.no_access_token: Server did not return an access token.
callback.token_exchange_timeout: Token exchange timed out. Please try again.

oauth.title: Allow Access
oauth.heading: Allow Access?
oauth.unverifiable: This authorization request could not be verified.
oauth.request_timeout: Authorization request timed out. Please try again.
oauth.missing_redirect: Authorization server did not return a redirect URL.
oauth.decision_timeout: Authorization decision timed out. Please try again.
oauth.requester_text: {host} is requesting access to your account.
oauth.allow_profile: It can see your profile and the server data available to you.
oauth.allow_messages: It can read and send messages as you.
oauth.allow_remember: Chatto will remember this approval for this address.

error_page.title: Something went wrong
error_page.description: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this page.
error_page.home_link: Go back to the home page

sign_out.title: Sign Out
sign_out.description: Sign out of only the selected server, or disconnect every server from this client.

threads.title: My Threads
threads.subtitle: Threads you're following
threads.empty_body: Threads you follow will appear here. You automatically follow threads you participate in.

create.title: Create a New Room
create.description: Rooms are conversations within your server.
create.universal_description: All server members (given the permission) automatically are members of this room.
create.missing_group: Choose a room group before creating a room.

join.title: Join Room
join.prompt: Join #{room} to read and participate in this room.
join.access_denied: You do not have permission to join this room.

leave.title: Leave Room
leave.prompt: Are you sure you want to leave #{room}? You can rejoin later.

directory.restricted_title: You don't have permission to join this room
directory.empty: No rooms in this server yet.
directory.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave #{room}?

server.leave_prompt: Are you sure you want to leave {server}? You'll lose access to its rooms, and your client will forget about this server. You can re-add it later from the sidebar.

message.delete_prompt: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This cannot be undone.

meta.copy_link_title: Click to copy link to this message

attachment.delete_prompt: Are you sure you want to delete this attachment? This cannot be undone.

link_preview.delete_prompt: Are you sure you want to remove this link preview? This cannot be undone.

sidebar.no_files: No files in this room yet.
sidebar.calls_unavailable: Calls are not available on this server.

server_settings.name_trim: Name cannot have leading or trailing whitespace
server_settings.manage_denied: You do not have permission to manage this instance
server_settings.description_help: Shown on the welcome screen and used as the description for link previews.
server_settings.motd_help: Single-line message displayed in the chat header. Supports markdown.
server_settings.welcome_message_help: Shown on the login page. Supports markdown.
server_settings.logo_description: Upload a logo for your instance. Images will be resized to 512x512 pixels.
server_settings.banner_description: Upload a banner for your instance. The banner doubles as the link-preview image - images are resized to 1200x630 pixels (the standard OpenGraph aspect ratio).

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.message: You do not have permission to access this page.

quick_switcher.placeholder: Go to server, room, or conversation...

welcome.verified: Your email has been verified and your account is ready.

room_list.empty_prefix: You haven't joined any rooms on this server. Head to the
room_list.empty_suffix: to browse the directory and join the ones you're interested in.

composer.notify_body: This message will notify {count} people. Send it anyway?

add_server.title: Add Server
add_server.description_url: Chatto is distributed - your client connects to each server directly. Enter a URL to add another.
add_server.description_preview: You're about to sign in on this server. You'll be sent to its sign-in page to authenticate.

delete_role.title: Delete Role
delete_role.prompt: Are you sure you want to delete the role {role}? This will:
delete_role.remove_from_users: Remove the role from all users who have it
delete_role.delete_grants: Delete all permission grants for this role

role_form.name: Name
role_form.name_description: Lowercase letters only. Cannot be changed after creation.
role_form.name_too_long: Name must be 32 characters or less
role_form.name_invalid: Name must use lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes; start with a letter
role_form.name_locked: Role names cannot be changed after creation.
role_form.display_name_too_long: Display name must be 64 characters or less
role_form.pingable: Allow people to ping this role
role_form.pingable_description: Pingable roles appear in @ autocomplete and notify assigned room members.

permissions.no_roles: No roles applicable at this scope.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.subtitle: Review and remove active room bans

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: View and manage server members and their roles
members.search_placeholder: Search by login or display name...
members.not_found: Member not found. They may have left the server.
members.cooldown_active: Self-rename cooldown active for this user - {remaining} remaining.
members.never_renamed: User has never changed their username.
members.assign_roles_description: Assign server roles to this member. Changes are saved immediately.
members.view_roles_description: View the server roles assigned to this member.
members.implicit_role_tooltip: All server members have this role implicitly
members.cannot_revoke_own_role: You cannot revoke your own {role} role

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Manage server-wide role defaults
permissions.role_presets_intro: Roles bundle permissions for groups of users - for example a moderator role that can moderate messages, or a dev team role with access to engineering rooms. Assign roles to members from each user's profile.
permissions.create_role_subtitle: Create a new role for this server
permissions.create_after_hint: After creating the role, you can assign permissions to it on the edit page.
permissions.need_manage_create: You need the roles.manage permission to create roles.
permissions.need_manage_edit: You need the roles.manage permission to edit roles.
permissions.system_metadata_locked: System role metadata cannot be modified.
permissions.everyone_pingable_description: Use @all for room-wide delivery; everyone is not a role ping handle.
permissions.delete_role_description: Deleting this role will remove it from all users who have it assigned.
permissions.owner_permissions_hint: Owners are always granted all permissions. The matrix is read-only because owner permissions are not stored as editable grants or denials.
permissions.role_permissions_hint: This role's grants and denials across every scope. Combined with the user's other roles at resolution time - use the per-user matrix to see what an individual user ends up with.
permissions.everyone_implicit: All server members have the everyone role implicitly.
permissions.server_tier_intro: This page is for server-tier role permissions: broad defaults that apply before room-specific overrides.
permissions.server_tier_rooms_hint: Use Rooms for per-group and per-room overrides.
permissions.server_tier_denies_hint: Use denies deliberately: denying everyone in a room blocks all inherited allows at that tier.

rooms_admin.title: Rooms
rooms_admin.subtitle: Create, edit, organize, and archive rooms
rooms_admin.group_permissions_subtitle: Per-group role permission grants and denials
rooms_admin.room_permissions_subtitle: Per-room override permissions (layered on top of the room's group)
rooms_admin.group_permissions_hint: Per-group overrides for the channel rooms in this group. Defaults inherited from the server scope. Individual rooms can further override permissions from their own permissions page.
rooms_admin.room_permissions_hint: Per-room overrides for this room. Values set here take precedence over the group's and the server-wide defaults.
rooms_admin.empty_groups_body: Create a set to start organizing rooms.
rooms_admin.drag_hint: Drag rooms between groups to organize them. Drag group headers to reorder groups. Archived rooms stay in their set but are hidden from members.
rooms_admin.delete_group_blocked: Move all items out of this group before deleting
rooms_admin.label: Label
rooms_admin.delete_group_prompt: Are you sure you want to delete the set {name}?
rooms_admin.delete_link_prompt: Are you sure you want to delete {label}?
rooms_admin.archive_room_prompt: Are you sure you want to archive #{room}? Members will no longer be able to access this room.
rooms_admin.unarchive_room_prompt: Are you sure you want to unarchive #{room}? Members will be able to access it again.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Sign-up restrictions and account protection
security.blocked_usernames_description: One per line. Users cannot register with these names.

event_log.title: Event Log
event_log.subtitle: Browse the durable event-sourcing stream (EVT). Read-only - useful for debugging and as a starting point for the audit log.
event_log.subject: Subject
event_log.filtered_scan: Filtered scan inspected {limit} retained events and may have older matches outside that window.
